title: Valuation Where No Comparable Market
text: Notwithstanding any other provision of this article, the value of property for which there is no relevant, comparable market may be determined by any method of valuation that is just and equitable.

structure.article_title: Evidence of Market Value of Property

source.editorial_note: Amended by Stats. 1992, Ch. 7, Sec. 4. Effective January 1, 1993.
